'''âb-r-d''' ('''barada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nakadashi|nakadashi]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nakadashi|nakadashi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-r-d
|-
! Lemma
| barada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:baradithi|baradithi]] || [[word:baradiji|baradiji]] || [[word:baradishi|baradishi]] || [[word:baradi|baradi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:baraduthuth|baraduthuth]] || [[word:baradujuj|baradujuj]] || [[word:baradushush|baradushush]] || [[word:barad|barad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:baraduthu|baraduthu]] || [[word:baraduju|baraduju]] || [[word:baradushu|baradushu]] || [[word:baradu|baradu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:baradufuth|baradufuth]] || [[word:baradufuj|baradufuj]] || [[word:baradufush|baradufush]] || [[word:baraduf|baraduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:baradethe|baradethe]] || [[word:baradeje|baradeje]] || [[word:baradeshe|baradeshe]] || [[word:barade|barade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:baradothoth|baradothoth]] || [[word:baradojoj|baradojoj]] || [[word:baradoshosh|baradoshosh]] || [[word:barad|barad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:baradotho|baradotho]] || [[word:baradojo|baradojo]] || [[word:baradosho|baradosho]] || [[word:barado|barado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:baradofoth|baradofoth]] || [[word:baradofoj|baradofoj]] || [[word:baradofosh|baradofosh]] || [[word:baradof|baradof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:baradĂŠthĂŠ|baradĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:baradĂŠjĂŠ|baradĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:baradĂŠshĂŠ|baradĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:baradĂŠ|baradĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:baradathath|baradathath]] || [[word:baradajaj|baradajaj]] || [[word:baradashash|baradashash]] || [[word:barad|barad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:baradatha|baradatha]] || [[word:baradaja|baradaja]] || [[word:baradasha|baradasha]] || [[word:barada|barada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:baradafath|baradafath]] || [[word:baradafaj|baradafaj]] || [[word:baradafash|baradafash]] || [[word:baradaf|baradaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:baradasha|baradasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobaradasha|gobaradasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibaradasha|gokibaradasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:baradnĂŒsha|baradnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobaradnknĂŒsha|gobaradnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibaradnĂŒsha|gokibaradnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:baradshĂ«sha|baradshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobaradnkshĂ«sha|gobaradnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibaradshĂ«sha|gokibaradshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:baradrosha|baradrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaradnkrosha|gobaradnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaradrosha|gokibaradrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:baradmusha|baradmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaradnkmusha|gobaradnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaradmusha|gokibaradmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:baradsherasha|baradsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobaradnksherasha|gobaradnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibaradsherasha|gokibaradsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:baradngasha|baradngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobaradnkngasha|gobaradnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibaradngasha|gokibaradngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:baradyasha|baradyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobaradnkyasha|gobaradnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibaradyasha|gokibaradyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:baradyamasha|baradyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobaradnkyamasha|gobaradnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibaradyamasha|gokibaradyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:baradnĂŒshĂ«sha|baradnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobaradnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobaradnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaradnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibaradnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baradnĂŒrosha|baradnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaradnknĂŒrosha|gobaradnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaradnĂŒrosha|gokibaradnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baradnĂŒmusha|baradnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaradnknĂŒmusha|gobaradnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaradnĂŒmusha|gokibaradnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:baradshĂ«nĂŒsha|baradshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobaradnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobaradnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaradshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibaradshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baradshĂ«rosha|baradshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaradnkshĂ«rosha|gobaradnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaradshĂ«rosha|gokibaradshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baradshĂ«musha|baradshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaradnkshĂ«musha|gobaradnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaradshĂ«musha|gokibaradshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:baradronĂŒsha|baradronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobaradnkronĂŒsha|gobaradnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaradronĂŒsha|gokibaradronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:baradroshĂ«sha|baradroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobaradnkroshĂ«sha|gobaradnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaradroshĂ«sha|gokibaradroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baradromusha|baradromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaradnkromusha|gobaradnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaradromusha|gokibaradromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:baradmunĂŒsha|baradmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobaradnkmunĂŒsha|gobaradnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaradmunĂŒsha|gokibaradmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:baradmushĂ«sha|baradmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobaradnkmushĂ«sha|gobaradnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaradmushĂ«sha|gokibaradmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baradmurosha|baradmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaradnkmurosha|gobaradnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaradmurosha|gokibaradmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:barad|barad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠd|bĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobarad|hobarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠrĂŠd|hobĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobarad|hohobarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠrĂŠd|hohobĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbarad|nĂŒbarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠrĂŠd|nĂŒbĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbarad|nĂŒnĂŒbarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠrĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbarad|nĂŻbarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠrĂŠd|nĂŻbĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbarad|nĂŻnĂŻbarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠrĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubarad|lubarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠrĂŠd|lubĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubarad|lulubarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠrĂŠd|lulubĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libarad|libarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠrĂŠd|libĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibarad|lilibarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠrĂŠd|lilibĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobarad|kobarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠrĂŠd|kobĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobarad|kokobarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠrĂŠd|kokobĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebarad|kebarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠrĂŠd|kebĂŠrĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebarad|kekebarad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠrĂŠd|kekebĂŠrĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
